title: 2026 Grammys: See The Full Winners & Nominees List
text: The 2026 Grammy Awards ceremony held on February 1, 2026, at Crypto.com Arena in Los Angeles featured a wide range of nominations and winners across major categories. Record of the Year Winner: Kendrick Lamar and SZA for "Luther" defeated the following nominees: Bad Bunny - "DtMF", Billie Eilish - "Wildflower", Lady Gaga - "Abracadabra", Sabrina Carpenter - "Manchild", Chappell Roan - "The Subway", Doechii - "Anxiety", ROSÉ & Bruno Mars - "APT.". Other Major Winners: Album of the Year went to Bad Bunny for "Debí Tirar Más Fotos", making it the first Spanish-language album to win this award. Kendrick Lamar achieved historic success by surpassing Jay-Z to become the most-decorated rapper in Grammy history. The ceremony was hosted by Trevor Noah for his sixth consecutive year and aired on CBS and Paramount+ Premium. Notable moments included performances by ROSÉ and Bruno Mars, Lady Gaga, and Sabrina Carpenter, among others. The 2026 Grammy Awards showcased diverse musical talent and historic wins across multiple categories.
